workers.label: Backend tests
workers.focus: Create ONE new pytest file under backend/tests/ (do not edit existing tests). Mirror test_gateway_rag.py: ADMIN_HEADERS = {"X-Actor-Role": "Platform Admin", "X-Actor-Id": "admin-upstream"}; seed runtime config via TestClient before GET routes that need data. For missing auth assert 401; for deny assert 403. If the route is not implemented yet, assert status in (404, 501). Max 60 lines. Do NOT import backend.* or invent modules.
